Features How It Works Reviews Download

AI-Based Vocal Remover Online for DJ Singers

EasySplitter is the most innovative technology in the music industry. Just upload the track and remove vocals from a song, get 4 separated music versions - Vocal, Instrumental, Bass and Drums.

Start for Free Learn more

Why choose EasySplitter?

EasySplitter is an innovative tool that has literally exploded the whole music industry. Our vocal remover became really irreplaceable service for Singers, DJs, Sound Producers, Compositors, Music Arrangers, and those who mixing and mastering music:

DJs

EasySplitter allows DJs to use it as a professional instrumental maker. Make vocal isolation online with full automation.

Learn more

Studio-Grade Quality

Export stems as lossless WAV or high-quality MP3. Every split preserves the full dynamic range of your source.

See formats

Works in Any Browser

No downloads or plugins needed. Process your tracks directly in Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge on any device.

Try it now

Private & Secure

Your files are processed on encrypted servers and deleted automatically after 24 hours. Your music stays yours.

Our policy

Why will you choose our app?

Fast Processing

EasySplitter has the best processing speed, allowing you to split songs in seconds.

Web & Mobile Sync

All features available in the web version are also in the mobile app. Files converted on web are instantly available in the mobile app, and vice versa.

Bug-Free

EasySplitter is built on clean, tested code and reviewed by professionals to ensure a smooth, reliable experience.

How It Works

1

Download EasySplitter

Download our app for free from the App Store or Google Play.

2

Create an Account

Tap 'Sign In' in the top-right corner of the app dashboard, then follow the 'Sign Up' instructions to create your account.

3

Start Splitting

After signing in, tap the button at the bottom of the dashboard, choose how many stems to split into, then select your audio file.

4

Download or Listen

Once splitting is complete, listen to all versions using the built-in player or download the stems you need. Files are saved in the 'History' tab.

EasySplitter is available for iOS and Android.

Download EasySplitter vocal remover app for free. Application is fully synchronized with the web version, this allows you to remove vocals from any song in both mobile and web ways. Splitting attempts can be purchased only in the web version.

Available on the App Store Android App on Google Play
